You are a project manager for the Payment Processing project.

A developer has raised this issue: "Build end-to-end test suite for payment reversal and chargeback workflows"
Domain: testing | Complexity: medium

Break this down into a well-structured task with full project management detail.

Return JSON with this exact structure:
{
  "task_id": "TASK-XXX",
  "title": "short action-verb title",
  "description": "2-3 sentence detailed description",
  "acceptance_criteria": ["criterion 1", "criterion 2", "criterion 3"],
  "story_points": <fibonacci: 1,2,3,5,8,13>,

{
  "task_id": "TASK-115",
  "title": "Develop E2E Test Suite for Payment Reversal and Chargeback",
  "description": "Create a comprehensive end‑to‑end automated test suite that validates the payment reversal and chargeback workflows in the Payment Processing system. The suite should simulate real‑world scenarios, verify state transitions, and integrate with the CI/CD pipeline to run on each build.",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Tests cover at least five distinct reversal scenarios and five distinct chargeback scenarios, including successful, partial, and failed cases.",
    "The test suite runs automatically in the CI pipeline and reports results with clear pass/fail status.",
    "All test code is reviewed, merged into the main branch, and documented in the project test plan."
  ],
  "story_points": 5,
  "priority": "High",
  "labels": [
    "testing",
    "e2e",
    "payment",
    "chargeback"
  ],
  "dependencies": [
    "Design payment reversal workflow (TASK-080)",
    "Implement chargeback API endpoints (TASK-092)"
  ],
  "definition_of_done": "The test suite is fully implemented, passes in the CI environment, includes documentation and coverage reports, and has been signed off by the QA lead."
}
